summary:
REJECTION OF TITLES AND WORLDLY RECOGNITION: Brandon clarifies that he does not identify as a prophet, but simply as someone who prays and loves Jesus. He states his primary purpose is to announce the return of Jesus without seeking a platform, fame, or earthly recognition. Brandon emphasizes that worldly success is a vapor and warns that individuals who perform good deeds for earthly praise will lose their heavenly rewards, highlighting the biblical principle that the last will be first. He explains that God constantly monitors hidden motives and thoughts, requiring actions to be done in secret and with pure intentions.

THE THOUSAND-YEAR REIGN: Brandon shares a revelation regarding the future thousand-year reign, explaining that daily actions and time spent on earth act as seeds. The positions and duties individuals will hold during this future period are directly determined by what they sow in their current lives. He stresses the absolute necessity of walking in love, refusing to retaliate against offenses, and maintaining an atmosphere of love to abide continuously in God's presence.

DEMONIC VISITATION AND TEMPTATION: Brandon details a nocturnal visitation where Satan appeared in his room. He describes the devil as deceptively beautiful, possessing flowing hair, black onyx eyes, and a soothing voice with perfect musical pitch. Satan offered immense wealth, including luxury vehicles and mansions, in exchange for worship and the use of Brandon's spiritual gifts. During this encounter, Brandon was shown a vision of the devil's throne room, which featured a black onyx throne, red rubies, Greek-style pillars, and a pool of blood, acting as a direct mockery of God's throne room. Brandon recounts refusing the offer, using prayer in the spirit to cast him out of his house in the name of Jesus.

SPIRITUAL DISCERNMENT: Brandon provides instruction on distinguishing between divine and demonic encounters. He explains that true visions from God bring perfect peace, joy, and align with scripture, whereas demonic interactions are accompanied by torment and fear. He warns against seeking casual fellowship with angels, clarifying that angels are strictly assigned by God for protection and warning, not for conversation or worship. He advises believers to maintain humility, never touch God's glory, and direct their fellowship exclusively toward the Holy Spirit.

PROPHETIC OUTLOOK FOR 2024: Brandon shares a prophetic message for the remainder of 2024, urging believers to expect significant blessings and supernatural financial provision. He asserts that a wealth transfer or supernatural harvest will occur for the righteous prior to any massive financial crash. He reassures that God will protect and provide for His people, ensuring they do not suffer through upcoming global dramas before receiving their promised blessings.
rawData: [August 01, 2024]-[The night the Devil came uninvited]-[https://youtu.be/v9kxwpFEiU0]-[Hey, good morning, family. How are you all doing today? I have some things on my heart to talk to you all about. First off, I just want to say thank you for all the people who are liking and subscribing; you are such a blessing to us. I mean, I think my channel went in the last two weeks from 125,000 to 130-something thousand now, and I give all the glory to God. You know, people want to say, 'Brandon, are you a prophet? Are you a watcher? Who are you?' And I just want to tell everybody now, I'm just a person who prays. I don't label myself as anything; I just want to let everybody know I just love Jesus, and that's all that matters. If anybody wants to label me anything—like with the interview of Chris yesterday—people say, 'You're a prophet,' or 'You're this, you're that.' No, I'm a person just like you all. I come on here and I tell everybody that Jesus is coming, and that's all that I want to be called. I don't need a platform. I don't need my name in lights. I just want Jesus to be excited about me when I cross over, and that's all that matters to me. I want to tell you all this; this is very important that you understand. The Lord gave me this revelation. I wasn't going to go down this path, but it just came up. People are so focused on being something big in this life, and you're missing it. If you want popularity, and if you're wanting the world system to acknowledge you—fame, money, success—all that, you're in trouble. People need to understand that this life is a vapor, and we all see that. I feel like the older I get, the time seems to be going faster and faster. But one night I was praying, and the Lord showed me into the thousand-year ruling and reigning. He said the last will be first, and the first will be last. A lot of people that feel they're going to have great rewards in heaven are going to be shocked because of the fact that you did it all for praise on the earth. The Bible says that he that sows in secret will be rewarded openly. Even Jesus said praying in secret, giving in secret, doing things without having to have praise on this earth—basically, that is what I'm trying to talk about: volunteering at the church or cleaning a bathroom just because you love the Lord. You didn't have to have people say, 'Look at me, look at me! I just gave $10,000 to the church!' versus the widow who gave two pennies, but she gave all she had. Look at what happened to the people in the story in the Bible; Jesus was saying she was greater, right? So here we are again: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. When you do things in private unto the Lord, there's more reward to that. Now, if you're doing it, like I said, some people want to say, 'Hey, well, I just want to let you know I gave that person this or that,' you got your reward right there. You're not getting anything on the other side. I'm just telling you, when we step over into that thousand years, you are going to be shocked when you see who's first and who's last. People have no idea the arrogance that they display in their hearts. The Lord looks at the core, the deep hidden things, the motives of why you do things, your thoughts, your intentions; everything, He looks at it. And I'm telling you all, He does it to me all the time. He says, 'Brandon, I'm monitoring your heart. I'm watching you.' And even whenever I have bad thoughts or I'm angry, He says, 'Check those thoughts. Change your thoughts right now.' And I say, 'Oh, yes, Lord.' The closer you get with Him and the closer you walk with Him, He will correct those things, and it's all to go from glory to glory. So, I'm going back to this: when you get to the other side and you did all these things unto the Lord versus doing it for the praise of man or because of a wrong motive, I'm telling you, the Lord showed me. He said everything is based on seedtime and harvest. Everything. Whatever a man sows, that will he also reap. And every seed produces after its own kind. So, whenever He showed me into the thousand years, He said, 'Brandon, what you're sowing every single day of your life...' Every day you get up, we all have seven days a week, we all have 24 hours in a day. What you sow in that time, day by day, turns into years. That timeframe is the seed that you sowed for the thousand years. Everything you seed in that timeframe is what you will reap—good intentions or whatever. Your heart sowing that into the thousand years, you're going to reap it. And the position you will have in that thousand-year ruling and reigning with Him, what you will do in those thousand years—I'm telling you all, I've seen it—it will be what you sowed in your life on this earth. How you walked in love... You have to walk in love. People say, 'Oh, you're being criticized all over the internet; are you going to respond to that?' And I say no. Love takes no account of a suffered wrong. No matter how bad somebody runs you down, you don't go back and attack. They have their opinion, they're entitled to it, but I don't have to allow people... They say, 'Why do you erase the comments? Why do you do all this stuff?' Because just as much as this is my house, I have to protect my people that come in here. You're not going to come and throw up all over my platform. It's my job to keep it, just like a pastor takes care of his church; he doesn't allow people to come in and just vomit all over the aisles and the stage. So, I'm not going to allow people to come and vomit in here. If you're rude, I erase it. My son does; I don't have time to read all that trash. But I'm going to tell you this: my job is to maintain love. Love takes no account of a suffered wrong. Regardless of how somebody is talking bad about you and running you down on another channel, the Bible says pray for those that come against you. Pray for them. Love on them, and that's what Jesus would do. He didn't go over there and say, 'Well, you Pharisees, I'm going to beat you up.' Jesus said, 'I love you, period. I pray for you.' And so that's where I have to stay: maintain an atmosphere of love because that's the greater glory. If you want to walk in the greater glory, if you want to walk in the presence of the Lord, God is love. It's not just what He does; it's who He is. God is love. And I want to abide in the Lord. 'If you abide in Me and My words remain in you, you shall ask what you will and it shall be done.' But God is love, and that has to abide in you, and you remain in Him. I'm telling you, the moment you start getting off of that love walk and not walking in love, you're letting the devil rule and reign over you. All I can do is keep looking at you and saying, 'Lord, help me,' because I want Jesus to flow through my life. I want Him to shine on me. Whenever I stand in this seat, I take it seriously. I pray, and I feel the Lord has told me to come on here and tell you all what He tells me to tell you. Now, if you think I'm off, like some people do, then just click out. Click it off. You don't have to be hateful and rude. Just click off and say, 'You know what? Whatever.' My job is to just try to tell you what I feel like the Lord told me to tell you. So here's what I had for you today. That was a little side note, but I have something more for you, and this is important that you hear. I am not giving glory or any kind of praise to the devil at all; he came uninvited. But I want to tell you this because I feel like it's important because people need to know some things like this. One night I was asleep, and I was woken up in the middle of the night, about 3:00 in the morning, with Satan standing right in front of my bed. At this time, I'm going to go into detail—and I never do this because he's not worthy of it, he is a piece of trash—but people need to understand more in detail about things. I think a lot of times the body of Christ is real ignorant of a lot of things of the spirit. I try to just brush over things sometimes, but I felt in my spirit today to go into more detail about things, and then I'm going to go somewhere else with it. So, I just want you to listen. I was woken up out of my sleep, and the devil was standing right there. I'm going to describe him to you: he is beautiful. His hair is flowing down to his shoulders, but it is very beautiful. The layers of him... The way his face was, it draws you in. His eyes were as black as onyx—the blackest, most evil eyes I've ever seen. It was just pure evil. But his face and his voice... His voice sounded like music. This is very interesting. The pitch of his voice was perfect. The way his voice carried when he spoke to me, it sounded like a symphony. It didn't sound like musical instruments playing; it carried perfect pitch. The way it hit my ears when I heard it, it was soothing. His clothes were flowing, and it almost looked like one of those commercials when you put the fan in front of the model's face and the hair is blowing and it's very dramatic—they flip their hair and the wind is blowing in it like a fan. It was like that because his hair was moving like it was alive. But he had a light around him. He comes as an angel of light—deceitful. He's trying to mimic everything that God is. He's so evil, but he comes as if he's good, but he is not. He is deceitful, and he's an accuser of the brethren. At this time, I was laying there, and I was frozen in my bed with the most fear I've ever felt in my whole entire life. I'm just being real with you all; I couldn't move. I was just locked. You know when you come up on a dog or something very dangerous, like a poisonous snake, your body and adrenaline are flowing so strong you just lock? That's the way I felt. I just froze and I started praying underneath my breath. I was saying, 'In the name of Jesus, get out of my house. In the name of Jesus, get out of my house.' But I was saying it out of so much fear. He started laughing at me, and he was cackling the whole time. He said, 'I've come with a message for you. I'm going to offer you something.' At this time I'm just frozen, not knowing what to do. This is what I think is interesting: when you're seeing over in the spirit, he used the gift that I have, the prophetic, to be able to attain it. With seeing over in the spirit with the demonic, I was shown a vision. Now, he presented this to me, and in the spirit, I saw it as a vision. I see this vision of all this, and he says, 'I'm going to offer you anything and everything if you bow your knee to me and you worship me.' He said, 'I will give you your heart's desires of everything and anything you ever wanted.' And he showed me. I could see cars—Ferraris, Lamborghinis—massive houses on the ocean, all this stuff, piles of cash. I could see piles of cash. He showed me all this wealth, a yacht—massive yachts—everything that your fleshly desires would ever imagine. He had it all spread out. 'If you bow your knee and you use your giftings for me, I will make you wealthy beyond anything you could ever comprehend.' So, he takes me in, and I see this massive palace. It's the most evil, but he tried to make it look beautiful. It was black onyx—his throne. Not an altar; it was a throne—a throne that was pure black onyx with red rubies and diamonds on it. But remember I told you I went to the throne room with the Father? The Lord showed me His throne. He tried to mimic and mock the Lord's throne. But I told you living water was flowing from the Father's throne—the most beautiful, clear crystal water was flowing out of the throne of God, and it was coming into a massive pool on the bottom of the steps of the Father. There was beautiful water, and it was living water. Well, down the devil's throne was blood, and there was a pool of blood at the bottom of the steps. It looked like red-looking, nasty stuff flowing down the steps of this place. In the front, it opened up and then there were these two black-looking pillars. It looked like marble because it was like the Roman Coliseum, the way that was all designed. It's all chiseled out like those Greek columns inside his throne room. There were all these pillars going straight up; I could see the pillars in the spirit realm. The floor had the pool of blood, and it was all right before his throne. He had this decoration stuff; of course, he's satanic, he's the devil. But it was all around the floor; it was like this marble and everything. He was trying to show all his wealth of what was his in the earth. All I could do at this time whenever he was offering me this... I spoke out loud and said, 'I will never bow my knee to you, and I will never give my heart over to you.' There's nothing that you could offer me that I would ever want. I was so angry at this moment because I was frozen in fear. And there's a lot of you that don't believe in the baptism of the Holy Spirit and speaking in other tongues, but I do believe it, and I practice this daily. All of a sudden, I just started praying in the spirit. The Lord told me, 'Brandon, you have to pray in the spirit and you have to build yourself up right now.' And I started praying in tongues. And what seemed like literally the whole time I'm praying in tongues, he's laughing at me and he's mocking me. It was like a cackle—the Michael Jackson Thriller laugh—the whole time he's laughing, and I'm telling you, it was so loud it felt like it was echoing in my house. My son will play what it sounded like; it sounded like Michael Jackson's 'Thriller.' He's laughing at me, and I'm praying in the spirit. I said, 'In the name of Jesus, get out of my house!' And he's just laughing. But I'm in fear, and fear tolerated is faith contaminated. When you're operating in fear, you're not operating in faith because you have more faith in the ability of the devil to hurt you than you have faith in God to protect you. Fear is fear of death. So I'm in fear of him, and at that moment I'm freaking out. But I'm praying in the spirit, and I'm just praying, and it felt like it was forever. All of a sudden, I just felt that bubbling, that fire come up out of my belly, and I said, 'In the name of Jesus, you get out of my house now!' And all of a sudden, everything went, and he disappeared right in front of my face because fire came up out of my belly. Out of your belly shall flow rivers of living water. You have authority over the devil, but you have to understand who you are in Christ, and you can't be in fear. You have to build yourself up by praying in the spirit. You have to understand that Word and get that Word down inside of your heart. You have to understand that greater is He that is in you than he that is in the world. You can't be afraid because when the devil shows up like that, you've got to understand who you are and you don't entertain it. But this is where I thought was interesting. How do you know when the devil comes and gives you a vision? Because people say, 'How? The devil's giving him visions.' The devil is giving you these things; he's a messenger of the devil, he's not a prophet of God. I've seen that side. You know how you know the difference between the Lord and the devil? You can get snared very easily by a familiar spirit messing with the way the Lord has allowed me to, with my prophetic gifting and being a watchman. You have to be in the presence of the Lord through worship and His Word. You will have to know when you're operating in the pureness of the gift, which is when you're under the glory. When you are underneath the presence in worship and you are reading your Bible and you're praying, there is not a devil in hell that comes like that. When that glory comes in and that's whenever you start seeing over, you will get snared if you're just going around saying, 'I'm seeing stuff, I'm seeing stuff.' You're going to get snared by a demonic spirit, and it's very easy to do. You have got to maintain... when you're underneath worship and it's pure and it's coming out of you and you get under that river of praise and worship and you start seeking the Father and you're praying and you're speaking in tongues and He starts showing you things... that's how you know. You get over in the spirit by praying in tongues, and you get in there and worship, and you get in the Bible, and then you say, 'Father, show me scriptures to back up what I'm seeing. Give me a scripture to back up,' because I'm not going to get snared by some kind of devil coming in here trying to tell me something. You have to get in the river of praise and worship and you have to get in the Word and test the spirits. Test the spirits and see whether they are of God or not. If it doesn't line up, you're going to... and I tell you this: you'll have peace that passes understanding. The Bible says the sheep will know the Shepherd's voice and a stranger's voice he'll not follow. But when you're hearing the devil, there's torment because fear has torment. He is a devil that torments. That's why I say a lot of times, 'How do you know that's God?' Because they have peace. He said He will have perfect peace whose mind is stayed on Him because he's trusting in Him. How do you have peace if you're seeing destruction and a pestilence? You have peace because He is the Prince of Peace. When He flows with you and you abide in Him and His words remain in you... when you're close to the vine and you're close to Him and you're with the Father, you will have peace. You have joy, you have patience, you have kindness, you have goodness, you have self-control because He is love. That's how I do it. That's how you do it: you follow the voice of the Lord when you walk in love, when you pray in the spirit, and you read your Bible and you fellowship with Him with worship. He said He inhabits the praises of His people. That's how I keep myself clean. That's how I keep myself right before Him. And volunteering... don't take any praise from Him; don't take any glory. Always know that we have this treasure in earthen vessels so that the excellence of the power might be known of Him and not of me. I have this treasure of Jesus in this earthen vessel, but the excellence of His power will be known of Him. It's about Him and it's not about me. If you always keep your heart right before Him and you always give Him praise, He'll come and visit you. But if you start taking His glory, if you start taking what belongs to Him like the devil did, He's going to cast you out. Look at what the devil did: he tried to say he exalted himself above God. He wanted to become like God; he wanted to be most powerful, and he fell like lightning. Just always know that you never touch God's glory. Always keep yourself humble before Him, and in due time He will exalt you. Always keep yourself small in your own eyes, and you keep walking with Him, and He'll come and share His secrets with you because He knows He can trust you. People think they can fool Him. It's silly. God knows your future more than you know your past, and you can't pull a fast one over on Him. This is interesting. A lot of people say, 'The devil's talking to me.' The devil's a fallen angel. So if you can hear the devil's voice in the spirit realm, you can hear your angel's voice in the spirit realm. But an angel will never come and talk to you just to talk—like, 'Hey, let's go hang out.' An angel is there on an assignment to warn you about something if need be. The Holy Spirit tells you a lot of things inside of you, but if he comes to you—you entertain angels unaware—they'll come and say, 'Listen, don't go this way,' and he's trying to really protect you. They're sent to protect us, but they're not there to hang out with you and to be your friend. So don't be going around saying, 'I'm going to hang out with my angel today,' because you'll get snared by a familiar spirit. Angels are there on assignment to protect you. I commission my angels; I say, 'Angels of the Lord, I thank you, you are protecting us.' And I commission them from the north, the south, the east, the west to protect our home today. I call my angels—swords and shields drawn—to watch over us. I always give God the praise; I never praise an angel. You never worship an angel. They are there to protect you, but they are not there to be worshipped. You can hang out with Jesus; you hang out with the Holy Spirit. He's the one that dwells on the inside of you. How do you know an angel's talking to you versus the devil? The devil's a fallen angel. Just don't talk to angels; talk to the Holy Spirit. I commission my angels all the time. 'Go with my children and you protect them as they go to this place or that place.' I thank You, Lord, that You're sending angels here with us to protect us on the way to church or on the way to the grocery store. I send my angels with my children to protect them as they go to school. I thank You, Lord, that Psalm 91 says that they will bear us up in their hands lest we dash our foot against a stone. They're ministering spirits sent for the heirs of salvation. I believe with all my heart that God's given His angels charge over us to protect us. I hope that blessed you all today. I need you all to understand that the devil comes to kill, steal, and destroy, and God said He came that we might have life and life more abundantly. I want to pray for you all today. Oh man, I almost said the Lord told me to tell you this also. He said, 'Brandon, you're coming to the last half of the year. Here we are; January's coming. What are you believing for in 2024?' The year's not over with. Do not give up on what you're believing for in 2024; this is not over. We've got half a year left. He said, 'Brandon, tell my people to believe for bigger.' Believe bigger in 2024. Believe that you can have exceedingly, abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. I believe with all my heart that the better days of 2024—the wealth of the sinner—is laid up for the righteous still yet to come this year. There's still something supernatural happening. People say, 'Well, you believe a crash is coming?' Not before financial blessings for the body of Christ. I do not believe that we will see a massive crash happen before God's blessing for His kids to get us out of it. He is not going to allow us to go through all the drama if you are the remnant and you are seeking Him daily. I believe God is going to take care of His kids and that He's going to provide for us with the supernatural harvest before we see all the drama. He said, 'I've never seen the righteous forsaken or his seed begging bread.' And I believe with all my heart God's going to take care of His kids. If you're listening to Him on what to do and how to invest, I believe great days are ahead before a financial shaking happens. Father, I just thank You for every single person that is represented here today. I bless them in the name of Jesus, and I thank You, Father, for Your hand on this house. I thank You, Lord, for Your hand on their houses. I thank You, Lord, that You're protecting us and that You watch over us. Father, You said that no calamity would come nigh us. Father, I thank You, Lord, that we are Your children and we hear Your voice and a stranger's voice we will not follow. I thank You, Father, that You said that You would supply all our needs according to Your riches and glory by Christ Jesus. I plead the blood of Jesus over every single one of us, from the top of our heads to the soles of our feet. I call us well in Jesus' name. Call them healed and whole and well. I thank You according to Your Word, Father, that by Your stripes we are healed. I thank You, Lord, that we don't have to have sickness and disease in our bodies according to Galatians—that Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law. I thank You, Lord, that You've given us authority over the devil, Father; that You said we shall trample on serpents and scorpions and nothing shall by any means hurt us. I thank You, Lord, that You said according to Your Bible, Father, that greater is He that is in us than he that is in the world. A thousand shall fall at your side and ten thousand at your right hand, but nothing shall come nigh us. I thank You, Father, that we submit ourselves therefore unto God, we resist the devil, and he will flee from us in Jesus' name. And Father, I thank You, Lord, for all those things that You promised us in Your scripture. I thank You, Lord, that we can be the head, not the tail; above and not beneath. Father, I pray for every single person that is watching this channel today, and I thank You, Lord, that they're refreshed and excited about life. They know that You said to believe for bigger. Believe for bigger, for exceedingly abundantly above all that you dare ask or think. I thank You, Father, that all our desires of our heart... You said You give us the desires of our heart. I thank You, Father. I thank You, Lord, that we are blessed in the city and in the field, coming in and going out. This is a good year—that 2024 is going to be a year that we soar and we go even higher with You, and that there is still half a year left. We give You praise for it. All of August, September, October, November, and December—five months. You can do a lot in five months. So Lord, we give You praise and glory for it today. We thank You, Lord, that You died on the cross and You rose again on the third day and You made it where we don't have to go to hell. Father, You paid the price for us, and Father, we love You and we worship You. We give You all the praise and glory for it in the mighty name of Jesus. Amen and amen. Well, like I said, thank you all for joining me. If you could, like and subscribe if you're not already subscribed. Thank you for sticking around. Put a smile on your face and a song in your heart. Jesus loves you so much and we love you, and we will see you all next time. God bless you all and have a wonderful day. Bye-bye.]
